productName: Honey Stixx - 2pk - Solventless Infused Preroll - Hash - Blueberry Trainwreck X Layer Cake - Sativa - 1g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Blueberry Trainwreck and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of blueberry, sweet, and berry, with a balanced head-and-body experience. A little goes a long way.
